message:
fix(render,text): optimize fill_area with scissor/opacity, fix bidi cursor mapping, and correct resize rate calc

**Render Buffer (buffer.rs)**
- Exposed `mark_dirty_span()`, `index_unchecked()` as pub(crate) for use
  by optimized drawing paths
- Added `cell_mut_unchecked()` for direct cell mutation without bounds checks
  (caller responsible for dirty tracking)

**Drawing — fill_area optimization (drawing.rs)**
- Rewrote `fill_area` to clip against current scissor rect before iterating,
  skipping no-op fills entirely for off-screen rects
- Applies current opacity layer to fg/bg colors with proper alpha compositing
  (`with_opacity` + `over` blending for background)
- Uses unchecked cell access with bulk dirty-span marking per row instead of
  per-cell bounds checks, significantly reducing overhead for large fills

**Presenter — viewport offset deduplication (presenter.rs)**
- Extracted `actual_y = y.saturating_add(self.viewport_offset_y)` once at the
  top of cursor-move logic, eliminating 5 redundant saturating_add calls across
  CUF/CUB/CHA/CUP code paths

**Resize Coalescer — rate calculation fix (resize_coalescer.rs)**
- Fixed event rate calculation: intervals between N events is N-1, not N,
  so rate is now `(len - 1) / duration` instead of `len / duration`

**BiDi Cursor Mapping — algorithmic rewrite (bidi.rs)**
- Rewrote `visual_cursor_pos()` from O(n²) scan-and-compare to O(1) lookup
  using `logical_to_visual` mapping with level-aware boundary attachment
- Cursor positions at LTR/RTL boundaries now attach to the correct visual
  side based on the embedding levels of adjacent characters
- Paragraph start/end positions correctly reflect base direction

**Text Editor (editor.rs)**
- Minor bounds handling adjustment in cursor positioning

**Rope (rope.rs)**
- Additional safety check in rope operations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
